---
title: "Hi, I'm Ilya Khanal"
---

::: {.hero}
# Ilya Khanal  
### Marketing • Data • Strategy  

Exploring the intersection of data-driven decision making and creative strategy in global business environments.

[View My Work](strategic-marketing.qmd){.hero-button}
:::

---

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="30%"}
![](images/me.jpg){width=100% style="border-radius: 50%;"}
:::

::: {.column width="70%" style="padding-left: 2rem;"}

I'm an International Business and Marketing student at **Cal Poly Pomona** with a strong interest in **marketing analytics and digital strategy**. I enjoy using data and creative strategy to understand consumer behavior and improve marketing performance.

:::

:::

---

## About Me

I am currently pursuing my degree in **International Business and Marketing** at Cal Poly Pomona. Through my coursework and hands-on experiences, I have developed a strong foundation in both **digital marketing** and **data-driven decision-making**.

---

## What I Do

::: {.cards}

::: {.card}
### Digital Marketing  
Campaign strategy, social media, and audience targeting  
:::

::: {.card}
### Data Analysis  
Using data to generate insights and support decisions  
:::

::: {.card}
### Global Strategy  
Analyzing international markets and expansion opportunities  
:::

:::

---

## What I Bring

- Experience with **digital marketing campaigns** and social media strategy  
- Understanding of **SEO and online advertising concepts**  
- Ability to analyze data and translate it into actionable insights  
- Strong communication and collaboration skills in team environments  
- Strong understanding of international import and export laws  
- International Business management and strategy knowledge  

---

## Career Interests

I am particularly interested in roles related to:

- Marketing Analytics  
- Digital Marketing  
- Business/Data Analysis  
- International Business Strategy  
- Trade Laws and Regulations  

I am motivated to apply analytical thinking and creative strategy to solve real-world business challenges.

---

## Let's Connect

- Email: ilyakhl313@gmail.com  
- Linkedin: https://www.linkedin.com/in/medha-khanal/  
- Github: https://github.com/ilyakhl313-prog  

---

*Welcome to my portfolio.*
